cmd: for u in 'webhook/crm-dashboard' 'webhook/portal?t=probe-invalid'; do echo "== GET /$u"; curl -s -m 20 -o /tmp/w.html -w 'HTTP %{http_code}, bytes %{size_download}\n' "https://irynakarmazina.app.n8n.cloud/$u"; head -c 200 /tmp/w.html; echo; done; echo '== POST /webhook/claude-sheets-proxy'; curl -s -m 20 -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{}' -o /tmp/p.txt -w 'HTTP %{http_code}, bytes %{size_download}\n' https://irynakarmazina.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/claude-sheets-proxy; head -c 300 /tmp/p.txt
